professionals.name: Dr. Kis Andrea
professionals.bio: General practitioner in Pécs. Medical degree from Pécsi Orvostudományi Egyetem (1995); licence exam (2001); family medicine specialty exam (2004). Research and teaching work at POTE/PTE; family practice in Pécs since 2001; mentoring/teaching at PTE ÁOK; external member of MEDMAX software development team; involved in TÁMOP and EFOP primary care development projects.
